description: Implement the lifecycle state machine in internal/lifecycle/machine.go. This encodes all valid state transitions from the design doc, including crash recovery paths. Implement Transition(), CanTransition(), IsTerminal(), and CanRetry(). Transition must handle side effects: incrementing retries on retry, requiring error messages on failure transitions, setting timestamps. Reference docs/implementation-plan.md Milestone 1e for the full transition map and side effect rules.
commit: feat(lifecycle): add state machine with transitions and crash recovery
steps: Create internal/lifecycle/machine.go with the validTransitions map exactly matching docs/implementation-plan.md Milestone 1e
Implement IsTerminal(s Status) bool -- true for merged and failed
Implement CanRetry(lc *Lifecycle, maxRetries int) bool -- true if retries < maxRetries and status is failed_validation or rejected

Implement Transition(lc *Lifecycle, to Status) error with side effects: increment Retries and clear Error on retry (failed_validation/rejected -> ready), require Error non-empty when transitioning to failed/failed_validation, set appropriate timestamps (ReadyAt, StartedAt, CompletedAt, ReviewedAt, MergedAt, FailedAt)

Create internal/lifecycle/machine_test.go: test every valid transition, test every invalid transition is rejected, test full happy path (pending -> merged), test retry logic, test crash recovery transitions (running/validating/reviewing/merging/resolving -> ready), test side effects
acceptance_criteria: validTransitions map matches the state machine diagram in docs/design.md exactly
CanTransition returns true for all valid transitions and false for invalid ones
IsTerminal returns true only for merged and failed
CanRetry returns false for failed (terminal), true for failed_validation/rejected when under max
Transition rejects invalid transitions with descriptive error
Transition increments Retries when retrying from failed_validation or rejected
Transition requires Error field set when transitioning to failed or failed_validation
Transition sets appropriate timestamps on each transition
